arts.sum: Arsenal are back in competitive action this evening as they host London rivals Fulham in the Premier League. The Gunners approach the final portion of the campaign residing in second place in the table. Mikel Arteta has received a huge boost personnel-wise, with Bukayo Saka recovering from a significant hamstring injury. arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly preparing bids up to £33.4m for Barcelona and Spain youngster Marc Casado, who has fallen down the pecking order in Catalonia.
